description: Style NoteIf you're a denim person, then these jeggings from wrangler are perfect for you. With a low waist and great slim Fit, this pair looks on trend and stays comfortable all day. Team this with feminine tops and stilletos for a chic look.Product DetailsBlack jeggings with a patch pocket on the right, two patch pockets on the back with stitched detailing and an elasticated waistband with mock zipperMaterial and CareCotton/spandexMachine wash cold separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wringWarm ironSize and FitSlim fit low waistThe model (height 5'8" and waist 26") is wearing a size 28
